flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Elgin Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Elgin Community College are 18% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($45.5k vs $38.4k).
